user: list all the laptops on this page with prices
content:
The user wants me to list all the laptops on the current page with prices. The current page is https://shop.example.com/category/laptops?page=1 with title "Laptops — Shop".

I need to:
1. First read the current page to understand what's on it
2. Look for laptops and their prices
3. Present them to the user

Let me start by reading the current page using get_accessibility_tree to see what's visible.[
    {"tool_call_id": "0", "tool_name": "get_accessibility_tree", "parameters": {"filter": "visible"}}
]
